title: WWE names ‘official auto insurance partner’
summary: Ahead of WrestleMania 42, WWE has entered into a new partnership with insurance company The General. It was announced today that the two sides have reached a multi-year agreement for The General to become the “official auto insurance partner of WWE.” The deal includes The General receiving center mat branding at WrestleMania 42, match sponsorships […]

title: Jey Uso involved in altercation with rapper Cam’Ron during podcast appearance
summary: An incident involving Jey Uso and rapper Cam’Ron took place on Thursday, though it is unclear whether the exchange was legitimate or staged. Uso was a guest on It Is What It Is with Cam’Ron and Ma$e on Thursday. Cam’Ron took shots at Uso for not being as good a wrestler as others in his […]

title: Full Card Announced For CMLL vs. MLW Show On May 1st
summary:
The follow-up to Fantasticamania USA. The partnership between CMLL and Major League Wrestling saw the two promotions come together to present Fantasticamania USA on April 12th in Charleston, South Carolina. They’ll be running another joint show on May 1st at Arena México, which is a CMLL versus MLW-branded event. There are going to be three …
